channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Nobel Prize Winner John Jumper Quits Google DeepMind For Anthropic
item.description: John Jumper won the chemistry Nobel Prize alongside Deepmind CEO Demis Hassabis for creating an AI model that can predict the structure of proteins called AlphaFold.
item.content:encoded: John Jumper won the chemistry Nobel Prize alongside Deepmind CEO Demis Hassabis for creating an AI model that can predict the structure of proteins called AlphaFold.

item.title: "I Was Trying To Be Funny, Not The Boss": Trump On Viral G7 Remark

media:content.media:description: Right after his 80th birthday party celebrations, Trump headed for the G7 summit in France

item.description: The US president drew laughs on Wednesday from his fellow G7 leaders for his quip as he walked into a meeting on the last day of their summit when he said, "I'm the boss."
item.content:encoded: The US president drew laughs on Wednesday from his fellow G7 leaders for his quip as he walked into a meeting on the last day of their summit when he said, "I'm the boss."

item.title: "Be Quiet": Israeli Envoy, Top UN Official's Shouting Match At New York Meet

media:content.media:description: Danny Danon and Vanessa Frazier (File photos)

item.description: Israeli envoy Danny Danon clashed with UN official Vanessa Frazier over a report that blacklisted Israel for alleged sexual abuses in conflict.
item.content:encoded: Israeli envoy Danny Danon clashed with UN official Vanessa Frazier over a report that blacklisted Israel for alleged sexual abuses in conflict.

item.title: Trump Asked Which World Leader He Admires Most, He Picks PM Modi, Xi Jinping

media:content.media:description: In the Axios interview, Trump repeatedly assessed power in terms of submission.

item.description: Donald Trump made the remarks on "The Axios Show" on Thursday, shortly after returning from a G7 summit in France that he described as "very dominant".
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump made the remarks on "The Axios Show" on Thursday, shortly after returning from a G7 summit in France that he described as "very dominant".

item.title: Russian Teen Jailed For 5 Days After Ordering Pizza As 'Adolf Hitler'

media:content.media:description: Teen detained in Russia for pizza order using Adolf Hitler name and Nazi symbol propagation.

item.description: Russian student, 18, jailed for ordering pizza as Adolf Hitler and sharing Nazi symbols online
item.content:encoded: Russian student, 18, jailed for ordering pizza as Adolf Hitler and sharing Nazi symbols online

item.title: India Secures Historic Vice-Presidency Of Anti-Money Laundering Body FATF

media:content.media:description: Vivek Aggarwal will serve as FATF vice-president for the term from July 2026 to June 2027

item.description: Vivek Aggarwal, a 1994-batch Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer of the Madhya Pradesh cadre and currently serving as Secretary, Ministry of Culture, has been elected and appointed as FATF Vice-President for the term from July 2026 to June 20
item.content:encoded: Vivek Aggarwal, a 1994-batch Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer of the Madhya Pradesh cadre and currently serving as Secretary, Ministry of Culture, has been elected and appointed as FATF Vice-President for the term from July 2026 to June 20

item.title: "Lot Of People Had Broken Legs": Passenger Recounts UK Train Collision Horror

media:content.media:description: The crash occurred late afternoon near Bedford

item.description: One person died and dozens were injured, 11 of them "very seriously", after two passenger trains collided near London on Friday.
item.content:encoded: One person died and dozens were injured, 11 of them "very seriously", after two passenger trains collided near London on Friday.

item.title: Driver Dead, Over 80 Injured Injured As 2 Trains Collide Near London

media:content.media:description: Both trains were traveling south to London St. Pancras station

item.description: Two Trains Collide Near London, Injuries Reported
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115619/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Two Trains Collide Near London, Injuries Reported

item.title: "World's Most Luxurious Plane": Trump Unveils Qatar-Gifted Air Force One

media:content.media:description: Trump delivered a speech as he stood in front of the VC-25B aircraft gifted by Qatar

item.description: US President Donald Trump unveiled on Friday a replacement Air Force One aircraft gifted by Qatar, which he dubbed a...
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump unveiled on Friday a replacement Air Force One aircraft gifted by Qatar, which he dubbed a...

item.title: Trump Says He Urged Israel To Agree To Ceasefire Deal With Hezbollah

media:content.media:description: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to a ceasefire on June 19 after deadly exchanges between the two sides.

item.description: In a phone interview with NBC News, Trump said he had been in contact with Israel earlier in the day and encouraged its leadership to support the ceasefire effort.
item.content:encoded: In a phone interview with NBC News, Trump said he had been in contact with Israel earlier in the day and encouraged its leadership to support the ceasefire effort.

item.title: Trump Says He Is Going To Turkey, China This Year
item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Friday he will go to Turkey and make another trip to China at some point in 2026.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said on Friday he will go to Turkey and make another trip to China at some point in 2026.

item.title: Gulf Nations Now Realise US Alignment Comes At A Cost: Ravi Agrawal

media:content.media:description: The impact of the conflict is being felt across the Gulf

item.description: Speaking to NDTV's Vishnu Som, Ravi Agrawal, editor-in-chief of Foreign Policy, said the war had become deeply unpopular in the US and many Americans were simply relieved that US President Donald Trump wanted to end American involvement.
item.content:encoded: Speaking to NDTV's Vishnu Som, Ravi Agrawal, editor-in-chief of Foreign Policy, said the war had become deeply unpopular in the US and many Americans were simply relieved that US President Donald Trump wanted to end American involvement.

item.title: "PM Modi Great Leader, Stays Out Of Wars, Which Is Smart": Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said that the US is doing "fair business" with India.

item.description: US President Donald Trump lavished praise on Prime Minister Narendra Modi, saying he is a "great leader" and "stays out of wars" and the US now does "fair business" with India.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115618/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US President Donald Trump lavished praise on Prime Minister Narendra Modi, saying he is a "great leader" and "stays out of wars" and the US now does "fair business" with India.

item.title: Russia Open To Talks With Europe, But With A "No Ultimatums" Condition

media:content.media:description: Putin has said that he is open to talks with European governments.

item.description: Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said common sense dictated the need for such contacts because of the "enormous number" of complex issues on the agenda, but he said the Europeans needed to change their approach to Russia.
item.content:encoded: Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said common sense dictated the need for such contacts because of the "enormous number" of complex issues on the agenda, but he said the Europeans needed to change their approach to Russia.

item.title: "Genocidal Death Cult": Araghchi Attacks Israel After 47 Killed In Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to renew their ceasefire, according to a US official

item.description: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to renew their ceasefire, according to a US official, after fresh violence in Lebanon put the fragile arrangement under pressure.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to renew their ceasefire, according to a US official, after fresh violence in Lebanon put the fragile arrangement under pressure.

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah Reach Ceasefire, But No Clarity on Lebanon's Occupied Areas

media:content.media:description: As per the IDF map, Israeli forces now occupy a 700 square km area of southern Lebanon.

item.description: Israel and Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah have reached a ceasefire agreement, a US official announced on Friday after an escalation in fighting in Lebanon threatened the chances of an interim agreement on ending the war in Iran.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah have reached a ceasefire agreement, a US official announced on Friday after an escalation in fighting in Lebanon threatened the chances of an interim agreement on ending the war in Iran.

item.title: "They're Finished. No Air Force, Navy, They Get No Money": Trump On Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: The US-Iran deal was signed this week.

item.description: The deal, signed this week by President Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart Masoud Pezeshkian, aims to end a conflict that began on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: The deal, signed this week by President Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart Masoud Pezeshkian, aims to end a conflict that began on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.

item.title: Strait Of Hormuz Traffic Highest In 2 Months, Thanks To US-Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: Iranian forces closed off the strait after US and Israeli strikes sparked the war on February 28.

item.description: A total of 25 commercial vessels crossed the newly reopened strait on Thursday, the highest number since mid-April, according to data from tracking firm AXSMarine.
item.content:encoded: A total of 25 commercial vessels crossed the newly reopened strait on Thursday, the highest number since mid-April, according to data from tracking firm AXSMarine.

item.title: US Needs $80 Billion For Iran War, Other Bills As Trump Faces Heat: Report

media:content.media:description: Pentagon leaders have said they risk running out of money for operations in the coming months.

item.description: President Donald Trump has faced backlash from Americans who accuse him of pouring billions of taxpayer dollars into the Middle East conflict while oil prices and inflation skyrocket in the United States.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump has faced backlash from Americans who accuse him of pouring billions of taxpayer dollars into the Middle East conflict while oil prices and inflation skyrocket in the United States.

item.title: "Unflinching Courage": Michelle Obama's Praise Moves Husband To Tears

media:content.media:description: Former President Barack Obama formally opened his presidential centre in Chicago on Thursday.

item.description: The Obamas and their daughters shared the stage with former presidents Joe Biden, George W Bush and Bill Clinton along with former first ladies Jill Biden, Laura Bush and Hillary Rodham Clinton.
item.content:encoded: The Obamas and their daughters shared the stage with former presidents Joe Biden, George W Bush and Bill Clinton along with former first ladies Jill Biden, Laura Bush and Hillary Rodham Clinton.
